title: Convert a value to JSON text
body: Convert a Python value into a JSON-formatted string and return that string.

title: Parse JSON from a string
body: Parse a JSON document held in a string and return the equivalent Python objects.

title: Self-deleting temporary directory
body: Make a self-deleting temporary directory and return a context manager that removes it on exit.

title: Encode bytes as Base64
body: Take a bytes value and return its standard Base64 encoding as a bytes object.

title: Strip shared indentation
body: Strip the shared leading indentation from every line of a block of text.

title: Memoize recent results
body: A decorator that memoizes a function by retaining its least-recently-used results.

title: Recursive object copy
body: Recursively copy an object so that the copy shares no mutable state with the original.

title: Copy a directory tree
body: Copy an entire directory tree to a new location and return the destination path.

title: Tally hashable items
body: A dict subclass that tallies how many times each hashable element appears.

title: All regex matches
body: Return every non-overlapping substring that a regular expression matches in the input.

title: Group consecutive runs
body: Iterate over consecutive runs of items that share a computed key.

title: Work with zip archives
body: An object that opens a zip archive to list, read, and write its members.

title: Load a CSV into pandas
body: Load a comma-separated-values file into a pandas DataFrame for tabular analysis.

title: Define a Flask route
body: Register an HTTP route handler in a Flask web application using a decorator.

title: Create a NumPy array
body: Create a NumPy ndarray of evenly spaced numeric values for vectorized math.

title: Define a PyTorch module
body: Subclass the PyTorch neural-network module base class to define a model.

title: Write a pytest fixture
body: Define a reusable pytest fixture that injects shared setup into test functions.

title: Send an HTTP POST with requests
body: Send an HTTP POST request with a JSON body using the third-party requests library.

title: TemporaryDirectory cleanup change
body: TemporaryDirectory no longer deletes the directory automatically; callers must remove it themselves.

title: lru_cache eviction change
body: lru_cache now evicts the most-recently-used entry first instead of the least-recently-used one.

title: b64encode return type change
body: b64encode now returns a str object rather than a bytes object.

title: deepcopy semantics change
body: deepcopy now performs a shallow copy and shares mutable substructure with the original.

title: findall result change
body: findall now returns only the first match instead of all matches.

title: copytree overwrite change
body: copytree now overwrites an existing destination directory instead of raising an error.
